headline: Sarawak Sues Petronas for RM2.6 Billion Gas Royalties
context: Sarawak filed RM2.6 billion claim against Petronas in February 2026 for unpaid gas royalties from LNG operations in Bintulu since 2019.

cards.big: Sarawak sues Petronas for RM2.6 billion in unpaid gas royalties
cards.sub: Dispute centres on whether royalty applies to processed LNG or raw gas only

cards.big: Petronas Bintulu LNG is world 3rd largest processing 30 million tonnes yearly
cards.sub: Facility operated since 1983 generating estimated RM800 billion cumulative revenue

cards.big: Sarawak argues 5% royalty should apply to LNG export value not wellhead price
cards.sub: Difference between the two calculations amounts to RM520 million per year

cards.big: Federal government urged out-of-court settlement to prevent market uncertainty
cards.sub: Petronas share price dropped 4.2% in the week following lawsuit announcement

cards.big: This lawsuit tests whether state resource claims can be enforced against federal companies
Sarawak suing Petronas for RM2.6 billion signals that negotiation has failed as a dispute mechanism.
